core_message: A strategic horizon scan of emerging AI cyber threats.
speaker_script_goal: Set the scene: this is a strategic AI threat intelligence briefing for the current period.

slide_purpose: High-level summary of key findings and total source volume
core_message: Key numbers, top findings, and what matters most.
speaker_script_goal: Communicate the headline findings and signal volume to decision-makers who may not read the full deck.

slide_purpose: Visualize the distribution of threat categories and source types
core_message: The AI threat landscape across four categories.
speaker_script_goal: Show the overall shape of the intelligence cycle — what categories dominated, what evidence types were collected.

slide_purpose: Deep-dive on attacks targeting ML models: poisoning, evasion, extraction, backdoors
core_message: Adversarial ML attacks on AI models are escalating in sophistication.
speaker_script_goal: Explain attacks on underlying ML models and why they matter for AI-powered security products.

slide_purpose: Deep-dive on LLM-specific threats: prompt injection, jailbreaks, RAG poisoning, guardrail bypass
core_message: Prompt injection and LLM manipulation are the leading attack vectors for deployed AI.
speaker_script_goal: Explain the expanding attack surface of deployed LLM applications and what organizations need to harden.

slide_purpose: Deep-dive on AI agent vulnerabilities: MCP risks, autonomous agent abuse, tool-use exploitation
core_message: Autonomous AI agents expand the attack surface and introduce new privilege escalation risks.
speaker_script_goal: Explain why agentic AI introduces fundamentally new risks around autonomy, tool access, and privilege escalation.

slide_purpose: Deep-dive on AI as an attack tool: deepfakes, AI phishing, AI malware, disinformation
core_message: Adversaries are using AI to automate, scale, and personalize attacks.
speaker_script_goal: Show how adversaries are weaponizing AI to enhance existing attack types at scale.

slide_purpose: Show where threats intersect and compound across categories
core_message: AI threats are converging — offensive AI, LLM attacks, and agentic risks are mutually reinforcing.
speaker_script_goal: Connect the dots across threat categories to show compounding risk and shared attack surfaces.

slide_purpose: Forward-looking assessment of threats expected to escalate
core_message: Key threats expected to operationalize or escalate in the next 6 months.
speaker_script_goal: Give analysts and decision-makers actionable intelligence about what to prepare for over the next 6 months.

slide_purpose: Consolidated recommendations and top priorities for defenders
core_message: Top priorities for AI-aware defenders in the current threat environment.
speaker_script_goal: Leave the audience with concrete priorities and a clear call to action.

slide_purpose: Cite all sources and explain the intelligence collection methodology
speaker_script_goal: Provide transparency on methodology and enable audience members to follow up on specific sources.
